output: Create a detailed ASCII art of a sitting cat facing forward. Use characters like pipe, slash, backslash, parentheses, caret, underscore, and tilde to form the body outline, pointed ears on top, round eyes made with o or 0, a small nose with caret, whiskers using dashes on both sides, and a curved tail wrapping around the base. The image should be about 15 lines tall and centered.

Generate ASCII art of a simple two-story house. Use forward slash and backslash for the sloped roof, pipe characters for the walls, equals or dash for floors, a centered door made with double pipes and underscore, two windows on each floor using +--+ style boxes, and a chimney on the roof. The house should be around 18 lines tall and 30 characters wide.

Create ASCII art of a rocket launching upward. Use slash and backslash for the pointed nose cone, pipes for the cylindrical body, small angle brackets for fins at the base, and asterisk or tilde characters below to represent exhaust flames. Add a porthole window in the middle of the body using parentheses. The rocket should be vertical, about 20 lines tall.

Draw a detailed ASCII art skull. Use curved characters to form a round cranium, two large hollow eye sockets made with parentheses, a triangular nose cavity using V or slash-backslash, and a row of teeth at the bottom using alternating n and U characters. The skull should look slightly menacing and be approximately 12 lines tall and 20 characters wide.

Generate ASCII art of a dragon in side profile. Include a long serpentine neck, an open mouth with teeth and a forked tongue, a large wing made with angled lines, clawed feet, and a pointed tail curling at the end. Use asterisk for fire breath coming from the mouth. The dragon should span about 20 lines and 40 characters wide.

Create ASCII art of a bright sun. Draw a circle in the center using O or curved characters, then extend rays outward in 8 directions using pipe, dash, and diagonal slash characters. Make the rays alternating in length for a dynamic look. Add small asterisks between the rays for extra brightness effect. The sun should be about 13 lines tall and 25 characters wide.

Create ASCII art of a coiled snake. Use S curves and wavy lines made from tilde and underscore characters to form the coiled body, a triangular head with V-shaped mouth, a forked tongue sticking out, and a rattle at the tail end. Add small dots or o marks to simulate scales along the body. The snake should fill roughly 12 lines.

Generate ASCII art of a large sailing ship on water. Draw a wide hull at the bottom using underscores and angle curves, two or three tall masts using pipes, sails billowing with curved parentheses lines, ropes as diagonal lines, a flag at the top, and wavy water below using tilde characters. The ship should be about 20 lines tall and 35 characters wide.

Create ASCII art of a wolf howling at the moon. Show the wolf in side profile sitting upright with head pointed up, an open mouth, pointed ears, a bushy tail, and detailed fur texture using pipe and exclamation mark characters. Add a crescent moon in the upper corner and stars made from asterisks in the background. The scene should span about 18 lines.

Draw ASCII art of a tall pine tree. Use a single trunk made from double pipes at the base, then build the tree upward with progressively wider layers of branches using slash and backslash patterns, each row wider than the one above it, starting narrow at the top. Add small asterisks and o characters to suggest pine needles and depth. The tree should be about 16 lines tall.

Create ASCII art of a friendly standing robot. Use a square head with antenna on top, two rectangular eyes using bracket-o-bracket, a mouth made with dashes, a wide rectangular torso with panel lines, two arms with claw hands, and blocky legs. Add a power button or screen on the chest. Use pipes, dashes, brackets, and parentheses throughout. Height should be around 18 lines.

Generate ASCII art of a steam locomotive moving to the right. Include a large cylindrical boiler body, a smokestack with puffs of smoke using at-sign or o characters, a cab for the driver, large circular wheels using O, connecting rods between the wheels, and a cow catcher at the front. Add speed lines behind to suggest motion. Span about 8 lines and 45 characters wide.

Create ASCII art of a butterfly with wings spread open. Use symmetrical left and right wings made from curved parenthesis lines with internal patterns using o, asterisk, and period characters. Connect the wings with a slender body in the center using pipes, add two antennae with small dots at the tips, and suggest color variation by using different density characters in the wing sections. About 10 lines tall.

Generate ASCII art of a medieval castle. Include a wide outer wall with battlements on top using alternating pipe-space patterns, a large central tower taller than the walls, a portcullis gate in the center using hash characters, smaller towers at the corners, and flags on top of each tower. Add a moat at the base using tilde characters. The castle should be about 20 lines tall and 50 characters wide.

Create ASCII art of a tropical fish swimming to the right. Use an angle bracket for the open mouth, a rounded body made from parenthesis curves, scales indicated by o or repeated pattern characters, a decorative dorsal fin on top, pectoral fins on the sides, and a fan-shaped tail fin on the left. Add bubbles above using small o characters. About 7 lines tall.

Draw ASCII art of a crescent moon. Use curved parenthesis characters to form the outer arc and inner cut to create the crescent shape. Make it large and prominent, about 14 lines tall. Add a face on the moon with simple dot eyes and a curved smile, and surround it with scattered asterisks and period stars of varying sizes to create a night sky atmosphere.

Create ASCII art of a bear standing on all fours in side profile. Use rounded characters for the large body and head, small rounded ears on top, a prominent snout made with parenthesis curves, small round eyes, four sturdy legs, and a short stubby tail. Add texture to the fur using alternating pipe and exclamation mark characters. The bear should look sturdy and grounded, about 12 lines tall.

Generate ASCII art of an acoustic guitar. Draw the body as a figure-eight shape using curved parenthesis characters, a sound hole in the center using O, a long narrow neck extending upward with frets as horizontal dash lines, six tuning pegs at the top, and strings running from bridge to nut using pipe characters. The guitar should be vertical, about 22 lines tall.

Create ASCII art of a lion facing forward with a full mane. Use a large circular mane made from backslash-pipe-slash characters radiating outward, a square-ish face in the center, large round eyes, a flat nose with w shape, a big open mouth showing teeth, and ears partially hidden by the mane. Add whisker dots on the cheeks using periods. The lion should fill about 15 lines and 25 characters wide.

Draw ASCII art of a dramatic mountain range. Create three peaks of varying heights using slash and backslash shapes, with the tallest peak in the center. Add snow caps at the top of each peak using asterisks or spaces. Show rocky texture on the slopes with scattered period and comma characters, pine trees at the base using caret shapes, and a reflection in a lake at the bottom using tilde characters. About 18 lines tall.

Create ASCII art of a crab viewed from above. Use a wide oval body in the center, two large claws extending to the left and right made with parentheses and V shapes, eight legs of varying lengths on each side using slash and backslash characters, and two small eyes on stalks at the top. Add texture to the shell using small o patterns. The crab should be about 9 lines tall and 30 characters wide.

Generate ASCII art of a grand piano in side view. Show the large curved lid on top using long diagonal and horizontal lines, the body tapering to the right, three legs of varying heights, and a keyboard section with alternating white and black keys visible from the front. Add a music stand and bench in front. The piano should be about 14 lines tall and 40 characters wide.

Create ASCII art of a bat hanging upside down. Use a round head at the bottom with pointed ears, small beady eyes using periods, a wide wingspan made from v curves and angled lines spread upward on both sides, a wrapped body in the center between the wings, and small claws gripping a surface at the very top. The bat should span about 9 lines and 28 characters wide.

Draw ASCII art of a tall lighthouse on rocky shore. Create a tapered tower body wider at the base, a lamp room at the top with a dome, light beams radiating outward from the lamp room using diagonal lines, a door and windows on the tower body, a spiral stripe pattern, and rocky cliffs at the base using jagged characters. About 22 lines tall and 20 characters wide.

Create ASCII art of a phoenix rising upward in flames. Show large outstretched wings made from layered angled lines with feather detail, a long elegant neck and crested head, a flowing tail with decorative feathers below, and flames surrounding the lower body and tail using asterisk, tilde, and caret characters. Use equals lines to separate the flame layers. About 20 lines tall.

Generate ASCII art of a computer keyboard viewed from a slight angle. Show rows of keys using +--+ style boxes, with correct key labels like Q W E R T Y on the top row, A S D F G H on the home row, and Z X C V B N on the bottom. Include a long spacebar at the bottom, function keys at the top, and arrow keys in the lower right. About 10 lines tall and 50 characters wide.

Create ASCII art of a wise owl perched on a branch. Use two large circular eyes as the focal point made with brackets and capital O characters, a hooked beak using v below the eyes, a round head with ear tufts, a plump feathered body with wing outlines, and talons gripping a horizontal branch below. Add a moon in the background and surround with asterisk stars. About 16 lines tall.

Draw ASCII art of an ornate hourglass. Create a wide top chamber tapering to a narrow center pinch point and then widening again at the bottom, using diagonal slash and backslash characters for the outer edges. Fill the top half with falling sand using period and comma characters sparsely, and show a pile of sand in the bottom chamber. Add a decorative frame on the outside using pipe and equals borders. About 18 lines tall.

Create ASCII art of a futuristic spaceship viewed from above. Show a sleek elongated body in the center with a pointed nose, two swept-back wings extending diagonally, engine nacelles at the wing tips using parentheses shapes, a cockpit window near the front, weapon ports along the wings, and engine glow at the rear using asterisk and tilde characters. Span about 12 lines and 35 characters wide.

input: ASCII art of a wolf pack
output: Generate ASCII art of three wolves in a snowy scene. Show wolves in different poses: one standing alert in side view, one sitting with head raised, one crouching low. Use pipe and exclamation mark characters for fur texture, jagged characters for ears, and tapered tails. Add a snow-covered ground using underscore lines, bare trees using pipes with branch marks, and a full moon above surrounded by asterisk stars.
